Source   Edit  

Imports

stringresize, asyncwrapper

Types

AsyncBufferLoader = proc (): Future[string]
Source   Edit   
AsyncLoadBuffer = object
  data*: string              ## buffer string, users need to access directly & keep track of position
  loader*: AsyncBufferLoader ## loads a string at a time to add to the buffer when needed
                             ## set to nil after returning empty string
  freeBefore*: int           ## position before which we can cull the buffer
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc callLoader(buffer: var AsyncLoadBuffer): Future[int] {....stackTrace: false,
    raises: [Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer loader is known not to be nil returns number of moved chars Source   Edit

    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer loader is known not to be nil returns number of moved chars Source   Edit   
proc initAsyncLoadBuffer(file: AsyncFile; loadAmount = 16; capacity = 32): AsyncLoadBuffer {.
    inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
file has to last as long as the reader Source   Edit
